Proposed Term Sheet: Strategic Investment and Option to Acquire Takibi Robotics K.K. by Hoshizora Systems K.K. (listed on the Standard Market)
Hoshizora Systems K.K. to subscribe for new shares via third-party allotment to achieve 55% post-money ownership at JPY 1,240 per share; a call option to initiate a TOB for remaining shares within 12 months, subject to board approval and antitrust review.
Financing: JPY 4.5 billion unsecured bridge facility from Ayatori Bank, Ltd. at 0.85% per annum, availability conditioned on timely disclosure and no adverse Material Facts as defined under the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act (FIEA).
Prior to public announcement on TDnet targeted for 2026-06-15 08:30 JST, the existence and terms of this transaction constitute undisclosed “Material Facts” (重要事実) under FIEA and are non-public; issuer-relative materiality is assessed under internal guidelines.
Selective disclosure is prohibited; any investor communication will be made via TDnet and simultaneous press release in accordance with the stock exchange Timely Disclosure Rules.
Blackout: Directors, officers, and employees are subject to an internal trading blackout from 2026-06-01 until release of the Q2 kessan tanshin and for two trading days thereafter; any acquisition-related equity grant is deferred until the information is public.
Conditions precedent include approvals of both boards, absence of any stop order by the competent authority, completion of confirmatory due diligence, and clearance by the Japan Fair Trade Commission if thresholds are met.
APPI/My Number: Due diligence will use redacted HR rosters and anonymized customer datasets; no “Individual Number” (My Number) or other individual identification codes will be collected, transferred, or processed for transaction purposes, and any processor engagement will include APPI-compliant safeguards.
Public information reference: The issuer’s FY2025 Securities Report (yukashoken hokokusho) filed on 2026-06-01 and the 2025-11-10 press release regarding the IoT consortium remain public and unchanged; certain figures herein rely on those public sources and may be stale.
Non-issuer operational update (benign): Takibi Robotics’ 2026-05-20 blog post announcing a Nagoya showroom is operational in nature and not material to the issuer’s decision-making.
Employee matters: Post-closing retention plan for key engineers will be adopted; personal names will be pseudonymized during diligence and no employee personal data will be exported outside Japan without appropriate measures under the APPI.
Confidentiality: Internal circulation is limited to need-to-know; external advisors are bound by NDA; any leak may require immediate TDnet disclosure consistent with internal leak-response policy and exchange guidance.
Contact: Mr. Haruto Kanda, CFO, Hoshizora Systems K.K.; email: ir@hoshizora-kk.example; secure Q&A will be conducted only after public disclosure.
Exclusivity through 2026-07-31; long-stop date 2026-09-30; TDnet disclosure to precede closing by at least one full trading day, with any Extraordinary Report (rinji hokokusho) within six business days and a Large Shareholding Report if applicable thresholds are crossed.
Governing law: Japan; jurisdiction: Tokyo District Court; each party bears its own fees; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law provisions.
Negative assurance: Nothing herein constitutes a solicitation to sell or a TOB announcement; any tender offer will be resolved by the board and publicly announced in accordance with FIEA and applicable listing rules.
